ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Continued To May-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Blackwell for (petitioner) John Barakett. Janet Espey for (beneficiary) Kent Webster.

The Court stated that the petition for final distribution is on calendar because we have not received courtesy copies or a proposed order. Ms. Blackwell stated that she had requested a continuance as counsel have been communicating on how best to resolve their issues. Ms. Espey stated that they are trying to negotiate, that it started after the initial filing and that they had not been receiving the information that they wanted. Ms. Blackwell stated that her client is out of the country and will return in two weeks. The accounting petition was continued to May 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel was instructed to either file an amended petition or provide courtesy copies for what is already on file.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
